---
title: "FIGURE_89_MECONIUM_STOOL"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# IMPORT DATASET

```{r}
library(readxl)
df_clinic <- read_excel("df_clinic_final.xlsx")
df_clinic <- as.data.frame(df_clinic)
row.names(df_clinic) <- df_clinic$Sample
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
df_SCFA <- read_excel("SCFA_stool.xlsx")
df_SCFA <- as.data.frame(df_SCFA)

names(df_SCFA) <- c("Sample", "acetate_stool", "propionate_stool", "isobutyrate_stool", "butyrate_stool")

row.names(df_SCFA) <- df_SCFA$Sample

# df_SCFA <- df_SCFA[row.names(df_clinic), ]
```

```{r}
# identical(df_clinic$Sample, df_SCFA$Sample)

df_clinic <- merge(x = df_clinic[ , c("Sample", "Termness")],
                  y = df_SCFA,
                  all = T,
                  by = "Sample")

row.names(df_clinic) <- df_clinic$Sample
```


```{r}
library(readxl)
df_meconium <- read_excel("SCFA_meconium.xlsx")
df_meconium <- as.data.frame(df_meconium)

names(df_meconium) <- c("Sample", "acetate_meconium", "propionate_meconium", "isobutyrate_meconium", "butyrate_meconium")

row.names(df_meconium) <- df_meconium$Sample

```

```{r}
df_clinic <- merge(x = df_clinic,
                  y = df_meconium,
                  all = T,
                  by = "Sample")

row.names(df_clinic) <- df_clinic$Sample
```

```{r}
df_clinic$Termness[grep("^HD",
     df_clinic$Sample,
     value = F)] <- "adult"

df_clinic |> dplyr:::arrange(Termness, Sample) -> df_clinic

library(openxlsx)
 
# CB22	term
# CB39	term
# CB40	term
# CB41	term
# CB47	preterm
# CB48	preterm
# CB62	
# CB65	preterm
# CB79	preterm


df_clinic$Termness[which(df_clinic$Sample == "CB22")] <- "term"
df_clinic$Termness[which(df_clinic$Sample == "CB39")] <- "term"
df_clinic$Termness[which(df_clinic$Sample == "CB40")] <- "term"
df_clinic$Termness[which(df_clinic$Sample == "CB41")] <- "term"
df_clinic$Termness[which(df_clinic$Sample == "CB47")] <- "preterm"
df_clinic$Termness[which(df_clinic$Sample == "CB48")] <- "preterm"
df_clinic$Termness[which(df_clinic$Sample == "CB65")] <- "preterm"
df_clinic$Termness[which(df_clinic$Sample == "CB79")] <- "preterm"

df_clinic <- df_clinic[complete.cases(df_clinic$Termness), ]
```

```{r}
library(table1)
table_freq_SCFA <- table1:::table1.formula(~ . | Termness ,
                        topclass = "Rtable1-grid",
                        #render.missing = NULL,
                        data = df_clinic[ , -1])

table_freq_SCFA

library(openxlsx)

write.xlsx(table_freq_SCFA, file = "table_freq_SCFA.xlsx")


```


# acetate

```{r}



df_wide <- df_clinic[ , c("Sample",
                          "Termness",
                          "acetate_stool",
                          "acetate_meconium")]
```

```{r}
library(tidyr)
df_long <- tidyr:::pivot_longer(df_wide, 
                        cols = c(3:4),
                        names_to = "category", 
                        values_to = "value") 

df_long <- na.omit(df_long)

df_long$group_ok <- paste0(df_long$Termness, "_", df_long$category)

df_long$group_ok <- factor(df_long$group_ok,
                           levels = c("preterm_acetate_meconium",
                                      "preterm_acetate_stool",
                                      "term_acetate_meconium",
                                      "term_acetate_stool",
                                      "adult_acetate_stool"))

# lay log
df_long$value <- log(df_long$value+0.001)
df_long <- as.data.frame(df_long)
df_long
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggstatsplot)
library(ggsignif)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggsci)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(ggprism)

options(digits = 4)
options(scipen = 4)

df_long$Sample <- factor(df_long$Sample)

df_long <- as.data.frame(df_long)
```


## remove outlier

```{r}
list_group_check <- list()

levels(df_long$group_ok) -> group_ok_vec

for(i in 1:length(group_ok_vec)){
  
df_check1 <- df_long |> subset(group_ok == group_ok_vec[i])

b1 <- boxplot(df_check1$value, plot = F)

df_check1$value[which(df_check1$value %in% b1$out)] <- NA

list_group_check[[i]] <- df_check1

}

df_long <- do.call(rbind, list_group_check)

df_long <- na.omit(df_long)
```



## paired


```{r}
df_long$Sample <- as.character(df_long$Sample)

table(df_long$Sample) -> check_cb

check_cb[check_cb == 2] -> check_cb_yes

names(check_cb_yes) -> cb_ok

grep("^HD",
     df_clinic$Sample,
     value = T) -> adult_ok

df_long_paired <- df_long[df_long$Sample %in% c(cb_ok), ]

```

```{r}
df_list <- split(df_long_paired,
                 f = df_long_paired$group_ok)


```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list[["preterm_acetate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list[["preterm_acetate_stool"]][ , "value"]

# check_data <- data.frame(x_ok,
#                           y_ok)
# 
# b1 <- boxplot(check_data$x_ok, plot = F)
# check_data$x_ok[check_data$x_ok %in% b1$out] <- NA
# b2 <- boxplot(check_data$y_ok, plot = F)
# check_data$y_ok[check_data$y_ok %in% b2$out] <- NA
# 
# check_data <- na.omit(check_data)
# 
# x_ok <- check_data$x_ok
# y_ok <- check_data$y_ok


t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = T) -> preterm_paired

preterm_paired_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              round(preterm_paired$p.value, 6))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list[["term_acetate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list[["term_acetate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = T) -> term_paired

term_paired_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              round(term_paired$p.value, 6))
```

## t-test

```{r}
df_list_all <- split(df_long,
                 f = df_long$group_ok)


```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_acetate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["term_acetate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_term_meconium

preterm_term_meconium_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              round(preterm_term_meconium$p.value, 6))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_acetate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["term_acetate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_term_stool

preterm_term_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              round(preterm_term_stool$p.value, 6))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_acetate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["adult_acetate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_adult_stool

preterm_adult_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              round(preterm_adult_stool$p.value, 6))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["term_acetate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["adult_acetate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> term_adult_stool

term_adult_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              round(term_adult_stool$p.value, 6))
```

## plot

```{r}
table(df_long$group_ok) -> ok_lab

ok_lab
```

```{r}
preterm_meconium_xlab <- paste0("Preterm meconium\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "preterm_acetate_meconium"], ")")

preterm_stool_xlab <- paste0("Preterm stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "preterm_acetate_stool"], ")")

term_meconium_xlab <- paste0("Term meconium\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "term_acetate_meconium"], ")")

term_stool_xlab <- paste0("Term stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "term_acetate_stool"], ")")

adult_stool_xlab <- paste0("Adult stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "adult_acetate_stool"], ")")
```



```{r}
p_acetate <- ggplot(data = df_long,
             mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                              y = value)) +

      geom_line(color = "gray",
                alpha = 0.7,
                mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                              y = value,
                              group = Sample)) +
      
      geom_boxplot(mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                                 y = value,
                                 color = group_ok),
                   fill = "transparent",
                   width = 0.8,
                   outliers = F) +
      
      geom_point(size = 3,
                 alpha = 0.5,
                 mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                               y = value,
                               group = Sample),
                 color = "royalblue") +
      
      scale_color_manual(values = c("#E08AF9", 
                                    "#E08AF9",
                                    "coral",
                                    "coral",
                                    "#A0E1A1")) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(2, 14),
                     breaks = c(2,4,6,8,10)) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(preterm_meconium_xlab,
                              preterm_stool_xlab,
                              term_meconium_xlab,
                              term_stool_xlab,
                              adult_stool_xlab)) +

    ggsignif:::geom_signif(
                          annotations = c(preterm_paired_text,
                                          term_paired_text,
                                          preterm_term_meconium_text,
                                          preterm_term_stool_text,
                                          preterm_adult_stool_text,
                                          term_adult_stool_text),
                          textsize = 5,
                          vjust = -0.3,
                          y_position = c(9,
                                         9,
                                         9+1.2,
                                         9+1.2*2,
                                         9+1.2*3,
                                         9+1.2*4),
                          xmin = c(1, 3, 1, 2, 2, 4),
                          xmax = c(2, 4, 3, 4, 5, 5),
                          manual = F
                         ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +

  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  
  labs(title = "Acetate",
       x = "",
       y = " log \u03bcM/g ") +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

# p_acetate

ggsave(filename = "acetate.svg",
       plot = p_acetate,
       width = 8,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 300,
       units = "in")
```

![](acetate.png)

```{r}

```



# propionate

```{r}
df_clinic <- df_clinic[complete.cases(df_clinic$Termness), ]


df_wide <- df_clinic[ , c("Sample",
                          "Termness",
                          "propionate_stool",
                          "propionate_meconium")]
```

```{r}
library(tidyr)
df_long <- tidyr:::pivot_longer(df_wide, 
                        cols = c(3:4),
                        names_to = "category", 
                        values_to = "value") 

df_long <- na.omit(df_long)

df_long$group_ok <- paste0(df_long$Termness, "_", df_long$category)

df_long$group_ok <- factor(df_long$group_ok,
                           levels = c("preterm_propionate_meconium",
                                      "preterm_propionate_stool",
                                      "term_propionate_meconium",
                                      "term_propionate_stool",
                                      "adult_propionate_stool"))

# lay log
df_long$value <- log(df_long$value+0.001)
df_long <- as.data.frame(df_long)
df_long
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggstatsplot)
library(ggsignif)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggsci)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(ggprism)

options(digits = 4)
options(scipen = 4)

df_long$Sample <- factor(df_long$Sample)

df_long <- as.data.frame(df_long)
```


## remove outlier

```{r}
list_group_check <- list()

levels(df_long$group_ok) -> group_ok_vec

for(i in 1:length(group_ok_vec)){
  
df_check1 <- df_long |> subset(group_ok == group_ok_vec[i])

b1 <- boxplot(df_check1$value, plot = F)

df_check1$value[which(df_check1$value %in% b1$out)] <- NA

list_group_check[[i]] <- df_check1

}

df_long <- do.call(rbind, list_group_check)

df_long <- na.omit(df_long)
```



## paired


```{r}
df_long$Sample <- as.character(df_long$Sample)

table(df_long$Sample) -> check_cb

check_cb[check_cb == 2] -> check_cb_yes

names(check_cb_yes) -> cb_ok

grep("^HD",
     df_clinic$Sample,
     value = T) -> adult_ok

df_long_paired <- df_long[df_long$Sample %in% c(cb_ok), ]

```

```{r}
df_list <- split(df_long_paired,
                 f = df_long_paired$group_ok)


```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list[["preterm_propionate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list[["preterm_propionate_stool"]][ , "value"]

# check_data <- data.frame(x_ok,
#                           y_ok)
# 
# b1 <- boxplot(check_data$x_ok, plot = F)
# check_data$x_ok[check_data$x_ok %in% b1$out] <- NA
# b2 <- boxplot(check_data$y_ok, plot = F)
# check_data$y_ok[check_data$y_ok %in% b2$out] <- NA
# 
# check_data <- na.omit(check_data)
# 
# x_ok <- check_data$x_ok
# y_ok <- check_data$y_ok


t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = T) -> preterm_paired

preterm_paired_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              capture.output(cat(preterm_paired$p.value)))

```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list[["term_propionate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list[["term_propionate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = T) -> term_paired

term_paired_text <- paste0("p = ",
                          capture.output(cat(term_paired$p.value)))
```

## t-test

```{r}
df_list_all <- split(df_long,
                 f = df_long$group_ok)


```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_propionate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["term_propionate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_term_meconium

preterm_term_meconium_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              round(preterm_term_meconium$p.value, 6))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_propionate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["term_propionate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_term_stool

preterm_term_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              round(preterm_term_stool$p.value, 6))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_propionate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["adult_propionate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_adult_stool

preterm_adult_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              round(preterm_adult_stool$p.value, 6))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["term_propionate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["adult_propionate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> term_adult_stool

term_adult_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              round(term_adult_stool$p.value, 6))
```

## plot

```{r}
table(df_long$group_ok) -> ok_lab

ok_lab
```

```{r}
preterm_meconium_xlab <- paste0("Preterm meconium\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "preterm_propionate_meconium"], ")")

preterm_stool_xlab <- paste0("Preterm stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "preterm_propionate_stool"], ")")

term_meconium_xlab <- paste0("Term meconium\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "term_propionate_meconium"], ")")

term_stool_xlab <- paste0("Term stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "term_propionate_stool"], ")")

adult_stool_xlab <- paste0("Adult stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "adult_propionate_stool"], ")")
```



```{r}
p_propionate <- ggplot(data = df_long,
             mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                              y = value)) +

      geom_line(color = "gray",
                alpha = 0.7,
                mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                              y = value,
                              group = Sample)) +
      
      geom_boxplot(mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                                 y = value,
                                 color = group_ok),
                   fill = "transparent",
                   width = 0.8,
                   outliers = F) +
      
      geom_point(size = 3,
                 alpha = 0.5,
                 mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                               y = value,
                               group = Sample),
                 color = "royalblue") +
      
      scale_color_manual(values = c("#E08AF9", 
                                    "#E08AF9",
                                    "coral",
                                    "coral",
                                    "#A0E1A1")) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-2.5, 12),
                     breaks = c(-2,0,2,4,6,8)) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(preterm_meconium_xlab,
                              preterm_stool_xlab,
                              term_meconium_xlab,
                              term_stool_xlab,
                              adult_stool_xlab)) +

    ggsignif:::geom_signif(
                          annotations = c(preterm_paired_text,
                                          term_paired_text,
                                          preterm_term_meconium_text,
                                          preterm_term_stool_text,
                                          preterm_adult_stool_text,
                                          term_adult_stool_text),
                          textsize = 5,
                          vjust = -0.3,
                          y_position = c(7,
                                         7,
                                         7+1.2,
                                         7+1.2*2,
                                         7+1.2*3,
                                         7+1.2*4),
                          xmin = c(1, 3, 1, 2, 2, 4),
                          xmax = c(2, 4, 3, 4, 5, 5),
                          manual = F
                         ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +

  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  
  labs(title = "Propionate",
       x = "",
       y = " log \u03bcM/g ") +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

# p_propionate

ggsave(filename = "propionate.svg",
       plot = p_propionate,
       width = 8,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 300,
       units = "in")
```

![](propionate.png)

```{r}

```



# isobutyrate

```{r}
df_clinic <- df_clinic[complete.cases(df_clinic$Termness), ]


df_wide <- df_clinic[ , c("Sample",
                          "Termness",
                          "isobutyrate_stool",
                          "isobutyrate_meconium")]
```

```{r}
library(tidyr)
df_long <- tidyr:::pivot_longer(df_wide, 
                        cols = c(3:4),
                        names_to = "category", 
                        values_to = "value") 

df_long <- na.omit(df_long)

df_long$group_ok <- paste0(df_long$Termness, "_", df_long$category)

df_long$group_ok <- factor(df_long$group_ok,
                           levels = c("preterm_isobutyrate_meconium",
                                      "preterm_isobutyrate_stool",
                                      "term_isobutyrate_meconium",
                                      "term_isobutyrate_stool",
                                      "adult_isobutyrate_stool"))

# lay log
df_long$value <- log(df_long$value+0.001)
df_long <- as.data.frame(df_long)
df_long
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggstatsplot)
library(ggsignif)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggsci)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(ggprism)

options(digits = 4)
options(scipen = 4)

df_long$Sample <- factor(df_long$Sample)

df_long <- as.data.frame(df_long)
```


## remove outlier

```{r}
list_group_check <- list()

levels(df_long$group_ok) -> group_ok_vec

for(i in 1:length(group_ok_vec)){
  
df_check1 <- df_long |> subset(group_ok == group_ok_vec[i])

b1 <- boxplot(df_check1$value, plot = F)

df_check1$value[which(df_check1$value %in% b1$out)] <- NA

list_group_check[[i]] <- df_check1

}

df_long <- do.call(rbind, list_group_check)

df_long <- na.omit(df_long)
```



## paired


```{r}
df_long$Sample <- as.character(df_long$Sample)

table(df_long$Sample) -> check_cb

check_cb[check_cb == 2] -> check_cb_yes

names(check_cb_yes) -> cb_ok

grep("^HD",
     df_clinic$Sample,
     value = T) -> adult_ok

df_long_paired <- df_long[df_long$Sample %in% c(cb_ok), ]

```

```{r}
df_list <- split(df_long_paired,
                 f = df_long_paired$group_ok)


```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list[["preterm_isobutyrate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list[["preterm_isobutyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]

# check_data <- data.frame(x_ok,
#                           y_ok)
# 
# b1 <- boxplot(check_data$x_ok, plot = F)
# check_data$x_ok[check_data$x_ok %in% b1$out] <- NA
# b2 <- boxplot(check_data$y_ok, plot = F)
# check_data$y_ok[check_data$y_ok %in% b2$out] <- NA
# 
# check_data <- na.omit(check_data)
# 
# x_ok <- check_data$x_ok
# y_ok <- check_data$y_ok


t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = T) -> preterm_paired

preterm_paired_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              capture.output(cat(preterm_paired$p.value)))

```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list[["term_isobutyrate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list[["term_isobutyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = T) -> term_paired

term_paired_text <- paste0("p = ",
                          capture.output(cat(term_paired$p.value)))
```

## t-test

```{r}
df_list_all <- split(df_long,
                 f = df_long$group_ok)


```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_isobutyrate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["term_isobutyrate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_term_meconium

preterm_term_meconium_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              capture.output(cat(preterm_term_meconium$p.value)))



```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_isobutyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["term_isobutyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_term_stool

preterm_term_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              capture.output(cat(preterm_term_stool$p.value)))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_isobutyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["adult_isobutyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_adult_stool

preterm_adult_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              capture.output(cat(preterm_adult_stool$p.value)))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["term_isobutyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["adult_isobutyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> term_adult_stool

term_adult_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                               capture.output(cat(term_adult_stool$p.value)))
```

## plot

```{r}
table(df_long$group_ok) -> ok_lab

ok_lab
```

```{r}
preterm_meconium_xlab <- paste0("Preterm meconium\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "preterm_isobutyrate_meconium"], ")")

preterm_stool_xlab <- paste0("Preterm stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "preterm_isobutyrate_stool"], ")")

term_meconium_xlab <- paste0("Term meconium\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "term_isobutyrate_meconium"], ")")

term_stool_xlab <- paste0("Term stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "term_isobutyrate_stool"], ")")

adult_stool_xlab <- paste0("Adult stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "adult_isobutyrate_stool"], ")")
```



```{r}
p_isobutyrate <- ggplot(data = df_long,
             mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                              y = value)) +

      geom_line(color = "gray",
                alpha = 0.7,
                mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                              y = value,
                              group = Sample)) +
      
      geom_boxplot(mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                                 y = value,
                                 color = group_ok),
                   fill = "transparent",
                   width = 0.8,
                   outliers = F) +
      
      geom_point(size = 3,
                 alpha = 0.5,
                 mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                               y = value,
                               group = Sample),
                 color = "royalblue") +
      
      scale_color_manual(values = c("#E08AF9", 
                                    "#E08AF9",
                                    "coral",
                                    "coral",
                                    "#A0E1A1")) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-4, 10),
                     breaks = c(-4,-2,0,2,4,6)) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(preterm_meconium_xlab,
                              preterm_stool_xlab,
                              term_meconium_xlab,
                              term_stool_xlab,
                              adult_stool_xlab)) +

    ggsignif:::geom_signif(
                          annotations = c(preterm_paired_text,
                                          term_paired_text,
                                          preterm_term_meconium_text,
                                          preterm_term_stool_text,
                                          preterm_adult_stool_text,
                                          term_adult_stool_text),
                          textsize = 5,
                          vjust = -0.3,
                          y_position = c(5,
                                         5,
                                         5+1.2,
                                         5+1.2*2,
                                         5+1.2*3,
                                         5+1.2*4),
                          xmin = c(1, 3, 1, 2, 2, 4),
                          xmax = c(2, 4, 3, 4, 5, 5),
                          manual = F
                         ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +

  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  
  labs(title = "Isobutyrate",
       x = "",
       y = " log \u03bcM/g ") +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

# p_isobutyrate

ggsave(filename = "isobutyrate.svg",
       plot = p_isobutyrate,
       width = 8,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 300,
       units = "in")
```

![](isobutyrate.png)

```{r}

```


# butyrate

```{r}
df_clinic <- df_clinic[complete.cases(df_clinic$Termness), ]


df_wide <- df_clinic[ , c("Sample",
                          "Termness",
                          "butyrate_stool",
                          "butyrate_meconium")]
```

```{r}
library(tidyr)
df_long <- tidyr:::pivot_longer(df_wide, 
                        cols = c(3:4),
                        names_to = "category", 
                        values_to = "value") 

df_long <- na.omit(df_long)

df_long$group_ok <- paste0(df_long$Termness, "_", df_long$category)

df_long$group_ok <- factor(df_long$group_ok,
                           levels = c("preterm_butyrate_meconium",
                                      "preterm_butyrate_stool",
                                      "term_butyrate_meconium",
                                      "term_butyrate_stool",
                                      "adult_butyrate_stool"))

# lay log
df_long$value <- log(df_long$value+0.001)
df_long <- as.data.frame(df_long)
df_long
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggstatsplot)
library(ggsignif)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggsci)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(ggprism)

options(digits = 4)
options(scipen = 4)

df_long$Sample <- factor(df_long$Sample)

df_long <- as.data.frame(df_long)
```


## remove outlier

```{r}
list_group_check <- list()

levels(df_long$group_ok) -> group_ok_vec

for(i in 1:length(group_ok_vec)){
  
df_check1 <- df_long |> subset(group_ok == group_ok_vec[i])

b1 <- boxplot(df_check1$value, plot = F)

df_check1$value[which(df_check1$value %in% b1$out)] <- NA

list_group_check[[i]] <- df_check1

}

df_long <- do.call(rbind, list_group_check)

df_long <- na.omit(df_long)
```



## paired


```{r}
df_long$Sample <- as.character(df_long$Sample)

table(df_long$Sample) -> check_cb

check_cb[check_cb == 2] -> check_cb_yes

names(check_cb_yes) -> cb_ok

grep("^HD",
     df_clinic$Sample,
     value = T) -> adult_ok

df_long_paired <- df_long[df_long$Sample %in% c(cb_ok), ]

```

```{r}
df_list <- split(df_long_paired,
                 f = df_long_paired$group_ok)


```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list[["preterm_butyrate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list[["preterm_butyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]

# check_data <- data.frame(x_ok,
#                           y_ok)
# 
# b1 <- boxplot(check_data$x_ok, plot = F)
# check_data$x_ok[check_data$x_ok %in% b1$out] <- NA
# b2 <- boxplot(check_data$y_ok, plot = F)
# check_data$y_ok[check_data$y_ok %in% b2$out] <- NA
# 
# check_data <- na.omit(check_data)
# 
# x_ok <- check_data$x_ok
# y_ok <- check_data$y_ok


t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = T) -> preterm_paired

preterm_paired_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              capture.output(cat(preterm_paired$p.value)))

```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list[["term_butyrate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list[["term_butyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = T) -> term_paired

term_paired_text <- paste0("p = ",
                          capture.output(cat(term_paired$p.value)))
```

## t-test

```{r}
df_list_all <- split(df_long,
                 f = df_long$group_ok)


```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_butyrate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["term_butyrate_meconium"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_term_meconium

preterm_term_meconium_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              capture.output(cat(preterm_term_meconium$p.value)))



```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_butyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["term_butyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_term_stool

preterm_term_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              capture.output(cat(preterm_term_stool$p.value)))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["preterm_butyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["adult_butyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> preterm_adult_stool

preterm_adult_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                              capture.output(cat(preterm_adult_stool$p.value)))
```

```{r}
x_ok <- df_list_all[["term_butyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
y_ok <- df_list_all[["adult_butyrate_stool"]][ , "value"]
t.test(x_ok, 
       y_ok,
       paired = F) -> term_adult_stool

term_adult_stool_text <- paste0("p = ",
                               capture.output(cat(term_adult_stool$p.value)))
```

## plot

```{r}
table(df_long$group_ok) -> ok_lab

ok_lab
```

```{r}
preterm_meconium_xlab <- paste0("Preterm meconium\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "preterm_butyrate_meconium"], ")")

preterm_stool_xlab <- paste0("Preterm stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "preterm_butyrate_stool"], ")")

term_meconium_xlab <- paste0("Term meconium\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "term_butyrate_meconium"], ")")

term_stool_xlab <- paste0("Term stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "term_butyrate_stool"], ")")

adult_stool_xlab <- paste0("Adult stool\n(n = ", ok_lab[names(ok_lab) == "adult_butyrate_stool"], ")")
```



```{r}
p_butyrate <- ggplot(data = df_long,
             mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                              y = value)) +

      geom_line(color = "gray",
                alpha = 0.7,
                mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                              y = value,
                              group = Sample)) +
      
      geom_boxplot(mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                                 y = value,
                                 color = group_ok),
                   fill = "transparent",
                   width = 0.8,
                   outliers = F) +
      
      geom_point(size = 3,
                 alpha = 0.5,
                 mapping = aes(x = group_ok,
                               y = value,
                               group = Sample),
                 color = "royalblue") +
      
      scale_color_manual(values = c("#E08AF9", 
                                    "#E08AF9",
                                    "coral",
                                    "coral",
                                    "#A0E1A1")) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-4, 13),
                     breaks = c(-4,-2,0,2,4,6,8)) +
  
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(preterm_meconium_xlab,
                              preterm_stool_xlab,
                              term_meconium_xlab,
                              term_stool_xlab,
                              adult_stool_xlab)) +

    ggsignif:::geom_signif(
                          annotations = c(preterm_paired_text,
                                          term_paired_text,
                                          preterm_term_meconium_text,
                                          preterm_term_stool_text,
                                          preterm_adult_stool_text,
                                          term_adult_stool_text),
                          textsize = 5,
                          vjust = -0.3,
                          y_position = c(7.5,
                                         7.5,
                                         7.5+1.2,
                                         7.5+1.2*2,
                                         7.5+1.2*3,
                                         7.5+1.2*4),
                          xmin = c(1, 3, 1, 2, 2, 4),
                          xmax = c(2, 4, 3, 4, 5, 5),
                          manual = F
                         ) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +

  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  
  labs(title = "Butyrate",
       x = "",
       y = " log \u03bcM/g ") +
  
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

# p_butyrate

ggsave(filename = "butyrate.svg",
       plot = p_butyrate,
       width = 8,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 300,
       units = "in")
```

![](butyrate.png)

```{r}

```
